title: Passkeys killed our password reset queue
meta_description: Cut password reset queues 96% and auth infra costs 95% by migrating to passkeys — real numbers from 2.1M user app in Vietnam and Indonesia.
prewritten_tweet:
Teams burning $18k/month on password resets and OTP delivery finally have a better way.

Passkeys cut 96% of reset queues and 95% of auth infra costs.

https://kubaik.github.io/passkeys-killed-our-password-reset-queue
